summary: Retest of multi-department teaching-load scoping after fix to routes/deps.py and routes/auth.py. All previously failing tests now pass.
seed_data_creation: Test file creates its own multi-dept user via POST /api/users
context_for_next_testing_agent: pytest backend/tests/test_teaching_load_multi_dept_scope.py: 9 passed, 1 skipped. /api/auth/login and /api/auth/me now return department_ids, faculty_ids arrays (and /auth/me additionally returns department_names). Admin returns empty arrays as expected. Frontend smoke test skipped per instructions (acceptable per review request).
rca of the issue: Prior iteration_56 failures were due to get_current_user not exposing department_ids/faculty_ids arrays; fix in routes/deps.py + auth.py now populates these fields with backward-compat fallback.
